类 GrpcDocBuilderTemplate

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.builder.grpc.GrpcDocBuilderTemplate
所有已实现的接口:
IBaseDocBuilderTemplate<GrpcApiDoc>, IRpcDocBuilderTemplate<GrpcApiDoc>
public class GrpcDocBuilderTemplate extends Object implements IRpcDocBuilderTemplate<GrpcApiDoc>
gRPC doc builder template.
从以下版本开始:
3.0.7

  • 字段概要

    从接口继承的字段 IBaseDocBuilderTemplate

    log, NOW

    从接口继承的字段 IRpcDocBuilderTemplate

    DEPENDENCY_TITLE

    从类继承的方法 Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    从接口继承的方法 IBaseDocBuilderTemplate

    allInOneDocName, bindingCommonVariable, buildErrorCodeDoc, buildErrorCodeDocTemplate, checkAndInitForGetApiData, copyJQueryAndCss, getApiDoc, setCssCDN, setDirectoryLanguageVariable

    从接口继承的方法 IRpcDocBuilderTemplate

    buildAllInOne, buildAllInOneWord, buildApiDoc, getApiData, listOfApiData

    • buildSearchJs

      public void buildSearchJs(List<GrpcApiDoc> apiDocList, ApiConfig config, com.thoughtworks.qdox.JavaProjectBuilder javaProjectBuilder, String template, String outPutFileName)
      从接口复制的说明: IRpcDocBuilderTemplate
      Build search js.
      指定者:
      buildSearchJs 在接口中 IRpcDocBuilderTemplate<GrpcApiDoc>
      参数:
      apiDocList - list data of Api doc
      config - api config
      javaProjectBuilder - projectBuilder
      template - template
      outPutFileName - output file
